name: sam_gov
description: SAM.gov MCP server (1102tools/federal-contracting-mcps). 19 read-only tools over the SAM.gov public API: entity registration lookups (UEI/CAGE), exclusions (debarment) checks, contract opportunity search + descriptions, FPDS-NG contract awards (search, lookup by PIID, deleted awards), PSC code lookups, vendor responsibility checks, federal organization hierarchy, and acquisition + assistance subaward search. Note: upstream consolidates FPDS data into this server (no standalone FPDS MCP). Requires SAM_GOV_API_KEY (free at sam.gov; rate-limited per key).
